title: Possibility to assign more than 1 role in Resource Directory

posts.author: hedielasmi (Hedi El Asmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the Resource Directory, it is currently possible to assign only one Role but multiple Skills to a resource.

While this setup works in some cases, it is not sufficient for project planning. In a project, the Resource Planner can only use the Role field, not the Skills field. As a result, planning resources based on their skills is not possible.

We would like to know if one of the following options is possible:

Allow assigning multiple roles to a resource, or

Enable the Skills column to be used in the Resource Planner placeholder within a project.

This would allow more accurate resource planning based on the actual capabilities of resources.

What are you trying to achieve

Have to possiblity to add a new placeholder with Skills in Resource Planner.
Add multiple roles in Resource Directory for one user.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @hedielasmi if you are open to a marketplace app, SuperPlanner lets you assign by both role and skill and shows each person’s real capacity including holidays and vacations. 1 min overview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vM_s-14szUk or learn more: https://spot-nik.com/product/superplanner/
